allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHubCLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\gh\\bin\\gh.exe"\); $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ })
